{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Archmage of sealing and binding
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The narrator is a [[Galactic Union]]-certified [[Archmage of sealing and binding]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c1">''The Captain'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The protagonist is an [[Archmage]] in sealing and [[binding]] magic.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3">''The Captain'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
